message:
feat: token panel layout fix + sparklines on all stats and models (#63)

- Move per-agent token rows to separate grid below totals row
- Add sparklines to all 6 totals (total, input, output, cache read,
  cache create, messages) with color-coded SVGs
- Add sparklines to model chips (per-model token history)
- Persist per-model + per-stat token data in sparkline history snapshots
  (server + client SSE) so sparklines survive dashboard restarts
- Add /api/pane/:agent endpoint for tmux session preview

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
